## Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with an 'x' -->

### Code Quality

- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] Self-reviewed my own code
- [ ] Commented complex or unclear code sections
- [ ] No console.logs or debug code left in
- [ ] Removed commented-out code

### Documentation

- [ ] Updated relevant documentation
- [ ] Added JSDoc comments for new functions/components
- [ ] Updated README.md if needed
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md

### Testing

- [ ] Added tests that prove the fix/feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally
- [ ] Added integration tests if needed
- [ ] Tested edge cases and error scenarios

### Security

- [ ] No sensitive data (keys, passwords, tokens) committed
- [ ] Input validation implemented where needed
- [ ] Authorization checks in place
- [ ] No new security vulnerabilities introduced

### Performance

- [ ] No performance regressions
- [ ] Optimized expensive operations
- [ ] Added loading states for async operations
- [ ] Considered bundle size impact
